combos.contextRelayHandoffThresholdHelp: When quota usage reaches this threshold, OmniRoute generates a structured handoff summary before the active account is exhausted.
combos.contextRelayMaxMessagesHelp: Limits how much recent history is condensed into the relay summary.
combos.contextRelaySummaryModelHelp: Optional override model used only for generating the handoff summary. Leave empty to reuse the active combo model.
combos.contextRelayProviderNote: Context Relay currently generates handoffs for Codex account rotation. Pair it with multiple accounts of the same provider for the best continuity.
combos.advancedHint: Biarkan kosong untuk menggunakan default global. Ini mengesampingkan pengaturan per penyedia.

priority.when: You have one preferred model and only want fallback on failure.
priority.avoid: You need request distribution across models.
priority.example: Primary coding model with cheaper backup for outages.

weighted.when: You need controlled traffic split across models.
weighted.avoid: You cannot maintain accurate weights over time.

round-robin.when: You want predictable and even distribution.
round-robin.avoid: Models differ too much in latency or cost.
round-robin.example: Same model on multiple accounts to spread throughput.

random.when: You want simple distribution with minimal setup.

least-used.when: You want adaptive balancing based on live demand.
least-used.avoid: Traffic is too low to benefit from usage balancing.
least-used.example: Mixed workloads where one model often gets overloaded.

cost-optimized.when: Cost reduction is your top priority.
cost-optimized.avoid: Pricing data is missing or outdated.
cost-optimized.example: Background or batch jobs where lower cost is preferred.

reset-aware.when: __MISSING__:You route across multiple accounts with quota telemetry and different reset windows.
reset-aware.avoid: __MISSING__:Quota telemetry is unavailable for most accounts.
reset-aware.example: __MISSING__:Prefer a 60% weekly account resetting tomorrow over an 80% account resetting later.

strict-random.when: Use when you want perfectly even spread — each model used once before repeating.
strict-random.avoid: Avoid when models have different quality or latency and order matters.
strict-random.example: Example: Multiple accounts of the same model to distribute usage evenly.

p2c.when: Use when you want low-latency selection using Power-of-Two-Choices algorithm.
p2c.avoid: Avoid for small combos with 2 or fewer models — no benefit over round-robin.
p2c.example: Example: High-throughput inference across 4+ equivalent model endpoints.

context-relay.when: Use when long sessions must survive account rotation without losing the working context.
context-relay.avoid: Avoid when account switching is rare or when you do not want extra summarization requests.
context-relay.example: Example: Codex sessions that rotate across multiple accounts near quota exhaustion.

fill-first.when: __MISSING__:Use when you want to fully exhaust one provider's quota before moving to the next.
fill-first.avoid: __MISSING__:Avoid when you need request-level load balancing across providers.
fill-first.example: __MISSING__:Example: Use all $200 Deepgram credits before falling back to Groq.

auto.when: __MISSING__:Use when you need multi-factor scoring routing based on cost, latency, and quality.
auto.avoid: __MISSING__:Avoid when you need strict priority ordering or historical persistence.
auto.example: __MISSING__:Example: Balance requests across models with different strengths.

lkgp.when: __MISSING__:Use when you want to route based on historical success rates and performance.
lkgp.avoid: __MISSING__:Avoid when historical data is limited or unreliable.
lkgp.example: __MISSING__:Example: Route to models with a good track record on specific tasks.

context-optimized.when: __MISSING__:Use when you need to optimize context window usage across models.
context-optimized.avoid: __MISSING__:Avoid when models have similar context lengths or tasks are simple.
context-optimized.example: __MISSING__:Example: Distribute long conversations across models with larger context windows.

advancedHelp.healthcheck: Skips unhealthy models/providers from routing decisions.

advancedHelp.queueTimeout: How long a request can wait in queue before timing out.
advancedHelp.failoverBeforeRetry: __MISSING__:When enabled, any upstream error triggers immediate failover to the next combo target, skipping all retries and fallback URLs.
advancedHelp.maxSetRetries: __MISSING__:Number of times to retry the full target set when every target fails. 0 = no set-level retry.
advancedHelp.setRetryDelayMs: __MISSING__:Delay between set-level retry attempts, giving transient issues time to resolve.

priority.title: Fail-safe baseline
priority.description: Use one primary model and keep fallback chain short and reliable.
priority.tip1: Put your most reliable model first.
priority.tip2: Keep 1-2 backup models with similar quality.
priority.tip3: Use safe retries to absorb transient provider failures.

weighted.title: Controlled traffic split
weighted.description: Great for canary rollouts and gradual migration between models.
weighted.tip2: Keep the total at 100% and auto-balance after changes.
weighted.tip3: Monitor success and latency before increasing canary weight.

round-robin.title: Predictable load sharing
round-robin.description: Best when models are equivalent and you need smooth distribution.
round-robin.tip2: Set concurrency limits to avoid burst overload.
round-robin.tip3: Use queue timeout to fail fast under saturation.

random.title: Quick spread with low setup
random.description: Use when you need simple distribution without strict guarantees.
random.tip1: Use models with similar latency profiles.
random.tip2: Keep retries enabled to absorb random misses.
random.tip3: Prefer this for experimentation, not strict SLAs.

least-used.title: Adaptive balancing
least-used.description: Routes to less-used models to reduce hotspots over time.
least-used.tip2: Combine with health checks for safer balancing.
least-used.tip3: Track per-model usage to validate distribution gains.

cost-optimized.title: Budget-first routing
cost-optimized.description: Routes to lower-cost models when pricing metadata is available.
cost-optimized.tip1: Ensure pricing coverage for all selected models.
cost-optimized.tip2: Keep a quality fallback for hard prompts.
cost-optimized.tip3: Use for batch/background jobs where cost is the main KPI.

reset-aware.title: __MISSING__:Reset-aware account rotation
reset-aware.description: __MISSING__:Balances remaining provider quota against reset timing.
reset-aware.tip1: __MISSING__:Use explicit account steps or account-tag routing for providers with quota telemetry.
reset-aware.tip2: __MISSING__:Tune session vs weekly weights when short-term exhaustion is more risky.

settings.title: Pengaturan
settings.routingSettingsIntro: __MISSING__:Controls how your requests are routed, transformed, and sent to AI providers.
settings.routingOpDropParagraphContainsDesc: __MISSING__:Removes any paragraph (text block split on blank lines) inside the system prompt whose text contains ANY of the listed substrings. Use to strip third-party client fingerprints like 'github.com/anomalyco/opencode' or 'docs.openwebui.com' that Anthropic's classifier flags.
settings.routingOpDropParagraphStartsWithDesc: __MISSING__:Removes any paragraph that STARTS WITH one of the listed prefixes. Use for identity lines like 'You are OpenCode' or 'You are Open WebUI' that announce the calling client.
settings.routingOpReplaceTextDesc: __MISSING__:Replaces a literal substring with another literal substring. Use for known trigger phrases — e.g. rewrite 'Here is some useful information about the environment you are running in:' to 'Environment context you are running in:' (an empirically-validated trigger phrase).
settings.routingOpReplaceRegexDesc: __MISSING__:Replaces text matching a regular expression. Use when you need patterns (character classes, optional whitespace, anchors) instead of literal substrings. A malformed pattern is caught at runtime when the op runs.
settings.routingOpDropBlockContainsDesc: __MISSING__:Removes ENTIRE system blocks (not just paragraphs) whose text contains any of the listed substrings. Use when a whole block is fingerprint-bearing and you want it gone — e.g. an injected MCP-server description.
settings.routingOpPrependSystemBlockDesc: __MISSING__:Inserts a new text block at the FRONT of the system array. Use to add the SDK identity 'You are a Claude agent, built on Anthropic's Claude Agent SDK.' that Anthropic's classifier expects.
settings.routingOpAppendSystemBlockDesc: __MISSING__:Inserts a new text block at the END of the system array. Use for cosmetic additions that don't need to be at position [0].
settings.routingOpInjectBillingHeaderDesc: __MISSING__:Prepends the special 'x-anthropic-billing-header: cc_version=...; cc_entrypoint=...; cch=...;' text block that Anthropic's classifier validates. Required for CC bridge relay endpoints; for the native claude provider OmniRoute already injects its own billing line so this op is usually redundant there.
settings.routingOpObfuscateWordsDesc: __MISSING__:Inserts a Zero-Width-Joiner character after the first letter of each listed word, so 'opencode' becomes 'o‍pencode'. Reads identical to humans but bypasses classifier word matches. Targets system blocks, user/assistant messages, and tool descriptions.
settings.routingNeedlesHint: __MISSING__:List of substrings. A paragraph matches if it contains ANY one of them. Add one per line via 'Add entry'.

translator.title: Penerjemah
translator.metaDescription: Debug, uji, dan visualisasikan terjemahan format API antar penyedia
translator.modeDescriptionPlayground: Tempelkan isi permintaan API apa pun dan lihat bagaimana OmniRoute menerjemahkannya di antara format penyedia (OpenAI ↔ Claude ↔ Gemini ↔ Responses API)
translator.modeDescriptionChatTester: Kirim permintaan obrolan nyata melalui OmniRoute dan periksa perjalanan pulang pergi secara lengkap: masukan, permintaan yang diterjemahkan, respons penyedia, dan keluaran yang diterjemahkan.
translator.modeDescriptionTestBench: Jalankan skenario yang telah ditentukan sebelumnya dan bandingkan kompatibilitas antar penyedia dan model.
translator.modeDescriptionLiveMonitor: Tonton acara terjemahan secara real time saat permintaan mengalir melalui OmniRoute.
translator.modeDescriptionFallback: Debug, uji, dan visualisasikan bagaimana OmniRoute menerjemahkan permintaan API antar penyedia.
translator.eventsAppearHint: Peristiwa penerjemahan muncul di sini saat permintaan mengalir melalui OmniRoute. Gunakan salah satu metode berikut untuk menghasilkan peristiwa:
translator.inMemoryNote: Catatan: Acara disimpan di memori dan disetel ulang saat server dimulai ulang.
translator.formatConverterDescription: Tempel atau ketik isi permintaan JSON. Penerjemah akan secara otomatis mendeteksi format sumber dan mengubahnya ke format target. Gunakan ini untuk men-debug bagaimana OmniRoute menerjemahkan permintaan antar format (OpenAI ↔ Claude ↔ Gemini ↔ Responses API).
translator.featureReasoningCacheDesc: __MISSING__:Re-injects cached reasoning_content for thinking-mode models (DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2, Qwen) when clients omit it from conversation history.
translator.featureSchemaCoercionDesc: __MISSING__:Fixes broken tool schemas: adds missing additionalProperties, sanitizes long descriptions, normalizes nested objects.
translator.featureRoleNormalizationDesc: __MISSING__:Maps developer→system for non-OpenAI targets. Maps system→user for models that don't support system role.
translator.featureToolCallIdsDesc: __MISSING__:Generates unique tool_call IDs when missing. Normalizes to 9-char format for providers like Mistral.
translator.featureMissingToolResponseDesc: __MISSING__:Injects empty tool_result messages when clients send tool_calls without corresponding responses.
translator.featureThinkingBudgetDesc: __MISSING__:Automatically manages thinking config. Removes thinking parameters when the last message is not from the user.
translator.featureDirectPathsDesc: __MISSING__:Some format pairs (Claude→Gemini) have direct translators that bypass the OpenAI hub, producing more accurate output.
translator.featureImageMappingDesc: __MISSING__:Translates image dimension conventions between API formats (e.g., OpenAI detail levels → Gemini dimensions).
translator.inputPlaceholder: Tempelkan isi permintaan di sini atau pilih templat di bawah...

translator.testBenchDescription: Jalankan skenario yang telah ditentukan sebelumnya (Obrolan Sederhana, Panggilan Alat, dll.) untuk memverifikasi kompatibilitas terjemahan dan penyedia. Pilih format sumber dan penyedia target, lalu jalankan semua pengujian untuk melihat persentase kompatibilitas. Gunakan ini untuk menemukan fitur mana yang berfungsi di seluruh penyedia.

legal.privacyMetadataDescription: Kebijakan privasi untuk router proksi OmniRoute AI API.
legal.termsMetadataDescription: Persyaratan layanan untuk router proksi OmniRoute AI API.
legal.privacySection1Text: OmniRoute dirancang sebagai aplikasi lokal pertama. Semua pemrosesan dan penyimpanan data sepenuhnya dilakukan di mesin Anda. Tidak ada server terpusat yang mengumpulkan informasi Anda.
legal.privacyDataStoredIn: Data berikut disimpan secara lokal di
legal.privacyDataProviderConfigurationsDesc: URL koneksi, jenis penyedia, dan pengaturan prioritas
legal.privacyDataApiKeysDesc: dienkripsi dan disimpan secara lokal untuk diautentikasi dengan penyedia AI
legal.privacyDataUsageLogsDesc: jumlah permintaan, penggunaan token, nama model, stempel waktu, dan waktu respons
legal.privacyDataApplicationSettingsDesc: preferensi tema, strategi perutean, dan konfigurasi kombo
legal.privacySection3Text: OmniRoute tidak mengumpulkan telemetri, analitik, atau laporan kerusakan. Tidak ada data yang dikirimkan kepada kami atau pihak ketiga mana pun. Pola penggunaan, panggilan API, dan konfigurasi Anda sepenuhnya bersifat pribadi.
legal.privacySection4Text: Saat Anda melakukan panggilan API melalui OmniRoute, permintaan Anda diteruskan ke penyedia AI yang telah Anda konfigurasikan (misalnya: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google). Penyedia ini memiliki kebijakan privasinya sendiri yang mengatur cara mereka menangani data Anda. Harap tinjau:
legal.privacySection5Text: Jika Anda mengaktifkan fitur sinkronisasi cloud opsional, konfigurasi penyedia dan kunci API dapat dikirimkan ke titik akhir cloud yang dikonfigurasi. Fitur ini dinonaktifkan secara default dan memerlukan keikutsertaan yang jelas.
legal.privacyLoggingIntro: Log permintaan dapat dikonfigurasi melalui pengaturan dasbor. Anda dapat:
legal.privacySection7TextStart: Karena semua data disimpan secara lokal, Anda memiliki kendali penuh. Anda dapat menghapus data Anda kapan saja dengan menghapusnya
legal.privacySection7TextEnd: direktori atau menggunakan fitur pencadangan dan pemulihan basis data di dasbor.
legal.termsSection1Text: OmniRoute adalah router proksi AI API lokal pertama yang beroperasi sepenuhnya di mesin Anda. Ini merutekan permintaan ke beberapa penyedia AI dengan penyeimbangan beban, failover, dan pelacakan penggunaan.
legal.termsResponsibilityApiKeys: Anda sepenuhnya bertanggung jawab untuk mengelola kunci API dan kredensial Anda sendiri untuk penyedia AI pihak ketiga (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, dll.).
legal.termsResponsibilityCompliance: Anda harus mematuhi persyaratan layanan setiap penyedia AI yang API-nya Anda akses melalui OmniRoute.
legal.termsResponsibilitySecurity: Anda bertanggung jawab atas keamanan instalasi OmniRoute lokal Anda, termasuk mengatur kata sandi dan membatasi akses jaringan.
legal.termsSection3Text: OmniRoute bertindak sebagai proksi perantara. Panggilan API yang dikirim ke OmniRoute diterjemahkan dan diteruskan ke penyedia AI Anda yang dikonfigurasi. OmniRoute tidak mengubah konten permintaan atau tanggapan Anda di luar terjemahan protokol yang diperlukan.
legal.termsDataStoredLocally: Semua data disimpan secara lokal di mesin Anda dalam database SQLite.
legal.termsNoTransmission: OmniRoute tidak mengirimkan data apa pun ke server eksternal kecuali Anda secara eksplisit mengaktifkan fitur sinkronisasi cloud.
legal.termsDataLocationText: Log penggunaan, kunci API, dan konfigurasi disimpan di
legal.termsSection5Text: OmniRoute disediakan "sebagaimana adanya" tanpa jaminan apa pun. Kami tidak bertanggung jawab atas segala biaya yang timbul akibat penggunaan API, gangguan layanan, atau kehilangan data. Selalu simpan cadangan konfigurasi Anda.
legal.termsSection6Text: OmniRoute adalah perangkat lunak sumber terbuka. Anda bebas memeriksa, memodifikasi, dan mendistribusikannya berdasarkan ketentuan lisensinya.

cache.title: Cache Management
cache.description: Monitor and manage semantic response cache, hit rates, and token savings.
cache.behaviorDeterministic: Only non-streaming requests with temperature=0 are cached.
cache.behaviorTwoTier: Two-tier storage: in-memory LRU (fast) + SQLite (persistent across restarts).
cache.unavailableDesc: Could not fetch cache statistics. Make sure the server is running.
cache.promptCacheSectionDesc: Shows provider-side prompt caching activity from usage history so you can see where cache control is active and how much input reuse you are getting.
cache.promptTrendDesc: Hourly request volume, cache coverage, and cache read volume across the last 24 hours.
cache.providerCacheRateDesc: Each provider exposes total input tokens, cache read tokens, and cache write tokens so you can verify the reuse ratio against raw totals.
cache.semanticCacheSectionDesc: OmniRoute's own deterministic response cache. When enabled, repeated non-streaming temperature=0 requests can be served locally without hitting the upstream provider.
cache.semanticCacheDisabledDesc: Semantic cache is disabled. OmniRoute will skip local response reuse until you turn it back on in Settings.
cache.semanticEntriesDesc: Persisted semantic cache records currently stored in SQLite. Provider-side prompt cache activity is not listed here.
cache.entriesLoadError: Failed to load semantic cache entries.
cache.noPromptCacheData: No provider-side prompt cache activity has been recorded yet.
cache.noTrendData: No prompt cache activity has been recorded over the last 24 hours.
